the position you are applying for may involve responsibilities that require a high level of trust and integrity. in connection with this, we ask that you indicate "yes" if you have been convicted of a criminal offense that is related to the job requirements, and "no" if you have not. please be aware that a criminal record will not automatically prevent you from being considered for the position, and saltlik will meet its obligations, if any, under applicable human rights legislation.
have you interviewed with the saltlik within the last 6 months?
have you ever worked with joey restaurant group (joey restaurants, local public eatery or saltlik) before?
